economic_notes: Band has non-controlling interest in forestry industry entities (Stuwix Resources Ltd. 12.5%, Stuwix Resources Joint Venture 12.5%, Esh-Kn-Am Joint Venture 25%, 9110 Investments Ltd. 25%). COVID-19 impacts noted. Construction of Phase 6 housing underway.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to Social Housing tangible capital assets being amortized at a rate equivalent to annual principal reduction of related long-term debt (CMHC requirement) rather than over estimated useful lives as required by PSAS. Auditor firm name not explicitly stated — identified only as Chartered Professional Accountants in Kamloops, BC. Consolidated entities include Coldwater Development Inc., Coldwater Housing Management, and Coldwater Projects. Four GBEs accounted for by modified equity method. Loss from GBE investments of $165,888 included in revenue. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($6,842,780) + FNHA ($269,039) + Province of BC ($65,724) + CMHC ($103,114) + FNESC ($300,944) = $7,581,601; OSR = $12,387,661 - $7,581,601 = $4,806,060. Construction loan of $262,475 outstanding for Phase 6 not included in long-term debt figure above.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
